name: accordion-demo
visual_summary: AccordionDemo is a collapsible content component that allows users to expand and collapse sections of information. It consists of a title, a button to toggle expansion, and a container for the content. This component is commonly used in dashboards and settings panels.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: accordion-demo
Description: AccordionDemo is a collapsible content component that allows users to expand and collapse sections of information. It consists of a title, a button to toggle expansion, and a container for the content. This component is commonly used in dashboards and settings panels.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: dashboard, collapsible, expandable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
